backup.sectionSubtitle: Create backups to protect your data or restore from previous backups.
backup.exportDescription: Save your database to a ZIP file
backup.importDescription: Restore database from a backup file

restoreDialog.title: Restore Complete
restoreDialog.message: The database has been restored successfully. The application will now restart to apply the changes.

maintenance.sectionSubtitle: Tools to maintain and fix database statistics and translation states.

actions.reanalyzeDescription: Fix status inconsistencies and detect untranslated units
actions.rebuildTmDescription: Recover missing TM entries from existing translations
actions.migrateTmHashesDescription: Convert old integer hashes to SHA256 for TM lookup
actions.resetOnboardingDescription: Bring back the Workshop onboarding card if you hid it

languagePreferences.sectionSubtitle: Manage available languages for translations and set the default target language

deleteLanguage.title: Delete Language
deleteLanguage.message: Are you sure you want to delete "$name"?

gameInstallations.sectionSubtitle: Configure paths to your Total War games
gameInstallations.detectAllDescription: Automatically find all installed Total War games

rpfm.sectionSubtitle: Path to RPFM executable for pack file extraction
rpfm.schemaDescription: Folder containing RPFM schema files (e.g., schema_wh3.ron)

workshop.sectionSubtitle: Base folder for Steam Workshop content (game IDs will be appended automatically)

toasts.notFound: Workshop folder not found. Please select manually.

addCustomLanguage.title: Add Custom Language
addCustomLanguage.description: Add a custom language that will be available for translation projects.
addCustomLanguage.info: Custom languages can be deleted later. System languages (English, French, etc.) cannot be modified.

errors.codeTooShort: Code must be at least 2 characters
errors.codeTooLong: Code must be at most 5 characters
errors.nameTooLong: Name must be at most 50 characters

backupRestoreDialog.title: Restore Database Backup?
backupRestoreDialog.fromLabel: You are about to restore the database from:
backupRestoreDialog.warningTitle: Warning: This will replace ALL your current data!
backupRestoreDialog.warningBody: All projects, translations, glossaries, and settings will be overwritten. This action cannot be undone.

llmProviders.title: LLM Providers
llmProviders.subtitle: Configure API keys and models for translation providers

models.footer: Check models to enable them. Click the star to set as global default.
models.legend: Check models to make them available for translations. Click the star to set a model as global default (only one default across all providers).
models.noModels: No models available for this provider

dialog.subtitle: Select which models are available for translations

customRules.accordionSubtitle: Add custom instructions to translation prompts
customRules.infoText: Custom rules are appended to every translation prompt sent to the LLM. Use this to define global instructions, terminology guidelines, or translation preferences that apply to all projects.

grid.emptySubtitle: Add global rules to customize all translation prompts

editorDialog.description: Enter the rule text that will be appended to every translation prompt. These rules apply globally to all projects.
editorDialog.ruleTextHint: e.g., Always use formal language and avoid contractions...
editorDialog.tipsText:
• Be specific and clear in your instructions
• Use bullet points for multiple rules
• Rules are appended in order to the translation prompt
• You can disable rules temporarily without deleting them

deleteDialog.title: Delete Rule
deleteDialog.message: Are you sure you want to delete this custom rule?

ignoredTexts.accordionSubtitle: Skip specific source texts during translation
ignoredTexts.infoText: Source texts matching these values will be excluded from translation. Note: Fully bracketed texts like [PLACEHOLDER] are automatically skipped. Use this list for custom patterns specific to your mods.

grid.emptySubtitle: Add source texts to skip during translation

editorDialog.description: Enter a source text that should be skipped during translation. Matching is case-insensitive.
editorDialog.infoText:
• Units matching these texts are excluded from translation
• Bracketed texts like [unit_name] are automatically skipped
• Use this for custom placeholders specific to your mods
• Changes take effect immediately for new translations

deleteDialog.title: Delete Ignored Text
deleteDialog.message: Are you sure you want to delete "$text"?

resetDialog.title: Reset to Defaults
resetDialog.message:
This will delete all current ignored texts and restore the default values:

• placeholder
• dummy

Note: Texts fully enclosed in brackets like [placeholder] are always filtered automatically.

Are you sure you want to continue?
